note: Pinned, fixed requirement checklist for ALL runs of this task. Authored once from the spec's 'Required Capabilities' section so requirement_coverage uses a constant denominator and is comparable across runs. Do not regenerate per-run.

requirements.requirement: Implements an MCP server (MCP protocol) exposing tools/handlers for the queries below
requirements.how_to_verify: An MCP server entrypoint + registered tools/resources exist (server SDK usage, tool definitions).

requirements.requirement: Loads and uses the provided datasets in data/kaggle/ as the data source
requirements.how_to_verify: Code reads the supplied CSVs (matches, FIFA players) rather than hardcoding or calling external APIs only.

requirements.requirement: Match query: find matches by team (home, away, or either)
requirements.how_to_verify: A tool/function filters matches by team name.

requirements.requirement: Match query: filter by date range and/or season
requirements.how_to_verify: Matches can be filtered by season/year or date range.

requirements.requirement: Match query: filter by competition (Brasileirao, Copa do Brasil, Libertadores)
requirements.how_to_verify: Competition is a selectable filter spanning the provided competition datasets.

requirements.requirement: Team query: match history with win/loss/draw record and goals for/against
requirements.how_to_verify: A tool returns aggregated W/L/D and goals for a team.

requirements.requirement: Player query: search players by name
requirements.how_to_verify: A tool searches the FIFA player data by name.

requirements.requirement: Player query: filter players by nationality and/or club, with ratings/attributes
requirements.how_to_verify: Players filterable by nationality or club, returning ratings.

requirements.requirement: Competition query: season standings calculated from match results
requirements.how_to_verify: Standings (points/positions) are computed from matches, not hardcoded.

requirements.requirement: Statistical analysis: aggregate stats (e.g. avg goals/match, home vs away, biggest wins)
requirements.how_to_verify: At least one aggregate statistic computed over the dataset.
A tool returns head-to-head W/L/D between two named teams.

requirements.requirement: Automated tests covering the query capabilities
requirements.how_to_verify: A test suite exercises the query functions; tests execute (test_coverage > 0).
